title: Characteristics of Games
creator: George Skaff Elias, Richard Garfield, and K. Robert Gutschera
description: An analytical book about multiplayer games, incentives, skill, luck, uncertainty, feedback, kingmaking, and other recurring design characteristics.
useful: Helps designers compare structures across tabletop and digital games without depending on genre labels.
audience: System designers comparing incentives and player behavior across different kinds of games.
learning: Compare games through recurring structural characteristics
Reason about skill, luck, uncertainty, and incentives
Spot multiplayer problems such as kingmaking and runaway leaders
